text.title: K8s VPA Rightsizing Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the rightsizing audit log + savings report. Subagent must satisfy this before promoting full rollout.

forbidden.pattern: vpa_recommend_mode_confirmed == false OR updateMode == Auto on workloads with HPA (violates r1)
hpa_envelope_check.passed == false OR headroom_after < headroom_before (violates r3)
rollout_stage == full_rollout without prior canary_results record (violates r4)
canary_results.oomkill_count > 0 AND rollback_workloads not documented (violates r5)
per_workload_changes entries with rationale empty or "VPA said so"

allowed-transformations.transformation: Extend soak_window_days beyond 7 days for workloads with monthly patterns (close-of-month batches, billing runs).
Bypass HPA envelope check for non-HPA workloads (StatefulSets without HPA) with documented note.
Add per-workload exceptions list (legacy services with anti-VPA exemption) — exceptions must reference an owning ticket.

list.item: VPA started in recommend mode only
Canary cohort ran ≥ 48h with metrics captured
